topic: Why Your Prayers Feel Unanswered: 7 Scriptural Reasons and Next Steps
why_it_matters: Unanswered prayer can birth doubt or distance. Scripture names common barriers and invites confident persistence.
short_hook: Prayer feels unheard? Check these 7 Bible reasons.
long_form_angle: Briefly cover seven themes with one next step each: Wrong motives (James 4:3), Unforgiveness (Mark 11:25), Hidden sin (Psalm 66:18), Timing (Habakkuk 2:3), Spiritual warfare (Daniel 10), Lack of persistence (Luke 18:1-8), God’s better grace (2 Corinthians 12:9). End with 1 John 5:14-15 confidence.
